rootCause: The process creation form switched text inputs to width: 100% on narrow screens, but the form did not apply border-box sizing. Input padding and borders were added outside that width, causing horizontal overflow on mobile only.
resolution: Applied border-box sizing to the ProcessForm container and descendants, and constrained text inputs with max-width: 100%. Added regression tests for ProcessForm plus mobile layout guard tests for ItemForm and QuestForm so full-width form controls remain container-safe.
